title: pisum rubrum
intro: Pisum rubrum, also known as garden pea or garden pea plant, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its high content of antioxidants, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pisum rubrum include reducing the risk of heart disease, improving digestion, and supporting bone health. The herbal preparations of Pisum rubrum include tea, extracts, and capsules, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
